title: PersonUpdated
description: Emitted when a person's core attributes (name, firstName) are updated.

eventId.description: Unique identifier for this event instance.

personId.description: Unique identifier of the person aggregate.

name.description: Updated last name of the person (may be encrypted when encrypted=true).

firstName.description: Updated first name of the person (may be encrypted when encrypted=true).

encrypted.description: When true, PII fields (name, firstName) are Vault-encrypted per ADR-009.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the event was produced.
